zh.Gifford, Yester, Haddingtonshire, Scotla: 蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾也斯特吉福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Douglas於1375年出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾時，她的父親Henry Douglas of Lugton and Lochleven28歲，母親Marjory Stewart40歲。她和William Wallace 9th of Riccarton至少有1個兒子。她去世於1458年10月6日在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾也斯特吉福德享年83歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭吉德布萊次爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Douglas于1375年出生在苏格兰度福利爾时，她的父亲Henry Douglas of Lugton and Lochleven28岁，母亲Marjory Stewart40岁。她和William Wallace 9th of Riccarton至少有1个儿子。她去世于1458年10月6日在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾也斯特吉福德享年83岁，埋葬在苏格兰吉德布萊次爾。

nameMeanings.name: Douglas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called from their situation on a river named with Gaelic dubh ‘dark, black’ + glas ‘stream’ (a derivative of glas ‘blue’). There are several localities in Scotland and Ireland so named, but the one from which the surname is derived in most if not all cases is Douglas in Lanarkshire 20 miles south of Glasgow, the original stronghold of the influential Douglas family and their retainers.

History: The family taking their name from Douglas in Lanarkshire were of Flemish origin. They rose to great prominence in the 14th and 15th centuries, controlling the earldoms of Douglas, Morton, and Angus, and later, Queensberry.

variants.name: Douglass
meanings: Scottish and English (Durham and Northumbria): variant of   Douglas  .

History: William Douglass, a physician recognized for his identification and description of an epidemic of scarlet fever, was born c. 1691 in Gifford, Haddington County, Scotland, and settled in Boston in 1718. The abolitionist, orator, and journalist Frederick Douglass assumed the name after escaping from slavery in 1838 and traveling to Massachusetts. Son of a white father and a slave with some Indian blood, he was born Frederick Augustus Washington Bailey c. 1817 in Tuckahoe, MD.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Douglas was born in 1375, in Dumfriesshire, Scotland, her father, Henry Douglas of Lugton and Lochleven, was 28 and her mother, Marjory Stewart, was 40. She had at least 1 son with William Wallace 9th of Riccarton. She died on 6 October 1458, in Gifford, Yester, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, at the age of 83, and was buried in Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Douglas est née en 1375, à Dumfriesshire, Écosse, son père, Henry Douglas of Lugton and Lochleven, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Marjory Stewart, avait 40 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec William Wallace 9th of Riccarton. Elle est décédée le 6 octobre 1458, à Gifford, Yester, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 83 ans, et a été enterrée à Kirkcudbrightshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Douglas 1375 in Dumfriesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry Douglas of Lugton and Lochleven 28 und ihre Mutter Marjory Stewart 40. Sie hatte mit William Wallace 9th of Riccarton mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 6. Oktober 1458 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Gifford, Yester, Haddingtonshire, Scotland und wurde in Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Douglas è nata il nel 1375 nel Dumfriesshire, Scotland, sua padre, Henry Douglas of Lugton and Lochleven, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Marjory Stewart, aveva 40 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con William Wallace 9th of Riccarton. Morì il 6 ottobre 1458, nel Gifford, Yester, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, all'età di 83 anni, e fu sepolta a Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Douglasが1375年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアで生まれた時，父Henry Douglas of Lugton and Lochlevenは28歳，母Marjory Stewartは40歳であった。彼女はWilliam Wallace 9th of Riccartonとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1458年10月6日にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアイエスターギフォードで83歳で死去し，スコットランドキルククウドブリトシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Douglas(이)가 1375년 스컷랜드 드프리실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Douglas of Lugton and Lochleven(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marjory Stewart(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 William Wallace 9th of Riccarton(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1458년 10월 6일 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 예스터 지퍼드에서 83세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 커kc드브라이츠히르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Douglas nasceu em 1375, em Dumfriesshire, Scotland, seu pai, Henry Douglas of Lugton and Lochleven, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Marjory Stewart, tinha 40 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com William Wallace 9th of Riccarton. Ela faleceu em 6 de outubro de 1458, em Gifford, Yester, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, com 83 anos, e foi sepultada em Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Douglas родилась в 1375 г. в местности думфриессхир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Henry Douglas of Lugton and Lochleven было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Marjory Stewart, 40. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от William Wallace 9th of Riccarton. Она умерла 6 октября 1458 г. в местности гиффорд, иестир, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия в возрасте 83 лет и была похоронена в местности кирккудбраицхир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Douglas nació en 1375, en Dumfriesshire, Scotland, su papá, Henry Douglas of Lugton and Lochleven, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Marjory Stewart, tenía 40 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con William Wallace 9th of Riccarton. Murió el 6 de octubre de 1458, en Gifford, Yester, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, a la edad de 83 años, y fue sepultada en Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland.
